description: Convert tabular data between csv, json, parquet, and excel.

tools.description: Convert tabular data between csv, json, parquet, and excel. Use inline content for csv/json text, input_path/output_path for workspace files, or source_uri/dest_uri to read and write via the AIDP URI scheme (master:<cat>.<sch>.<vol>:/<path> or workspace:/<path>). Use to reshape data files between steps or prepare an export.

schema.name: from_format
schema.description: Source format. When omitted and source_uri is supplied, the format is detected from the URI's path extension.

schema.name: content
schema.description: Inline source data (csv or json text). Use this OR input_path OR source_uri.

schema.name: input_path
schema.description: Workspace path to read from, relative to base_dir. Use this OR content OR source_uri.

schema.name: output_path
schema.description: Workspace path to write to, relative to base_dir. Required for parquet/excel output when not using dest_uri.

schema.name: source_uri
schema.description: AIDP URI to read the source file via aidp_io. Forms: master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>, workspace:/<path>, or the alias <catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>. When from_format is empty, it is detected from the URI's path extension.

schema.name: dest_uri
schema.description: AIDP URI to write the converted output via aidp_io. Same forms as source_uri. Required for parquet/excel output when no output_path is given.

_confDescriptions.base_dir: Root workspace directory for resolving input_path/output_path. Paths outside this dir are rejected (default /workspace).
_confDescriptions.max_rows: Maximum number of rows to read/write; returns truncated:true when hit (default 100000).
_confDescriptions.max_bytes: Cap on response/file bytes; returns truncated:true when hit (default 104857600 = 100MB). Also applies to bytes read from source_uri and written to dest_uri.
_confDescriptions.source_uri: AIDP URI to read the source file via the shared aidp_io module. Accepts master:<catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>, workspace:/<path>, or the alias <catalog>.<schema>.<volume>:/<path>. When from_format is not set, it is detected from the URI's path extension.
_confDescriptions.dest_uri: AIDP URI to write the converted output via the shared aidp_io module. Same URI forms as source_uri. Required for binary outputs (parquet/excel) when no output_path is supplied.
